reviews.review_description:
BEFORE UPDATE 😄
I have to say the update is week  at best. I enjoyed the game much more before the update.
  You do not get much replay out of this one.
 I will think twice about buying an early  access game  again 

Love this silly game. Graphics are adequate. Game plays is very good!!!
If you love killing hordes of skeletons this game for you.
The price is right. So don't wait start killing those skeletons. 
A big thank you to the game developers.
I'm loving it
AFTER UPDATE 
I was loving this game but since they turned it just 15 days it's boring. 
Now very easy to beat.
I would wait to see if the developers do some more  developing.if they do i will add back so stares🤪

I made a review about how the game was not working within an hour. The dev team had contacted me and fixed my problem. The game is working perfectly fine and it is amazing. I love playing the game. It is so much fun. You guys are doing an amazing job keep it up. ￼

The experience is incredibly immersive, and I’m looking forward to future updates! The game truly makes me feel like I’ve stepped into the boots of a medieval knight defending my castle. Very addictive about pulling back the slingshot, aiming, and taking down waves of enemies. Standing atop the castle walls adds an extra layer of immersion — I can almost feel the wind and hear the distant battle cries below. Every moment feels intense and rewarding, and I can’t wait to see how the game evolves from here!
Very fun! Looking forward to more days coming out. Would be cool to have archers on your walls or dudes to pour boiling oil if enemies get too close
Really fun and I love playing it. You get more and more into wanting to beat all the enemies the more you play. Very immersive and I'm looking forward to playing even more levels :D
很好玩，但是拋物線經常不見，造成我一直卡在第四天，過不了，請改善

developer_response.body: 谢谢您！我们正在看修复的办法，会尽快让游戏顺利进行

reviews.review_description: It's a fun game so far. It's helpful to know to turn the switches off and on to save your special ammo for larger groups. Might help if you actually label them off and on to save players getting frustrated.
This game is really easy to pick up and get used to. Ton of fun flinging stuff into big groups of enemies. Excited to see the future of the game.
Great core gameplay loop. Once this gets some more updates it's gonna be a must buy.

I really enjoy this game! Although it follows a basic tower defense gameplay, the various combinations make it highly engaging. I can easily play it for half an hour as a fun workout. Looking forward to more updates and improved graphics!

Really immersive game--I liked the slingshot mechanism and how there were tons of enemies that made it feel like I was in a real battle. Looking forward to way more levels and also more sound effects monsters etc!
Love the game so far!  Seeing hordes of enemies get launched away by explosions is always satisfying.  Can't wait do see what new days and enemies will be like!

I really like the concept of this game and it has kept me entertained for a while and considering that this is still in beta I feel like this game has a lot of potential. And honestly I feel like more people should know about this game.
Can’t wait for more levels. Very fun game. Can’t wait to see how it grows and improves over time.

reviews.review_title: Great VR Game for Fighting Against Horde
reviews.review_description: This is a fun VR game where you feel like a power user destroying huge hordes of monsters. I like the concept of building and upgrading siege weapons to help destroy the monsters down.
Promising start to an epic battle game.  Looking forward to new content and levels.
